understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid, changing my piece's shape, color, and rotation by stepping on modifier tiles to match the requirements of goal cells, then stepping on those goal cells to complete them, advancing through levels without running out of stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina. Walls block movement, and 'blocked_directions' tells me which directions are impassable. Shape modifier tiles cycle the piece through 6 shapes; color modifiers cycle the piece through 4 colors (orange → blue → green → red); rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. A goal cell activates when shape, color, and rotation all match, and stepping on it completes it. Completing all goals advances to the next level, and losing all stamina costs a life, with game over when all lives are lost.

history.summary: Reached 1 level(s) after 73 turns.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid, changing my piece's shape, color, and rotation by stepping on modifier tiles to match the requirements of goal cells, then stepping on those goal cells to complete them, advancing through levels without running out of stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina. Walls block movement, and 'blocked_directions' tells me which directions are impassable. Shape modifier tiles cycle the piece through 6 shapes; color modifiers cycle the piece through 4 colors (orange → blue → green → red); rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. A goal cell activates when shape, color, and rotation all match, and stepping on it completes it. Completing all goals advances to the next level, and losing all stamina costs a life, with game over when all lives are lost.
